heading: Administration and enforcement
label: 3803 Administration and enforcement

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Unless otherwise specified in this chapter, with respect to a vessel, the Secretary shall administer and enforce the Convention and this chapter.

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: b Administrator
children.text: Except with respect to section 3841(b) and (c) of this title, the Administrator shall administer and enforce subchapter III.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Administrator and the Secretary may each prescribe and enforce regulations as may be necessary to carry out their respective responsibilities under this chapter.
